---
name: Rule Suggestion
about: Propose a new universal rule file or an improvement to an existing one
title: '[RULE] '
labels: rule-proposal
assignees: ''
---

## What pattern should this rule cover?

<!-- Describe the coding pattern, workflow, or convention this rule would govern -->

## Why should it be universal?

<!-- Explain why this applies to most projects using Claude Code, not just one specific stack or domain -->

## Which file should it live in?

<!-- Existing file to update, or a proposed new filename (kebab-case, e.g., `api-versioning.md`) -->

## Proposed rule content

<!-- Draft the rule using this format:

## Rule
[What to DO and what NOT to do]

## Why
[The failure or situation that prompted this rule]

## Example
[Code or config snippet showing correct usage]
-->

## Stack/language relevance

- [ ] Language-agnostic (universal)
- [ ] .NET specific → would go in `examples/dotnet/`
- [ ] Node.js specific → would go in `examples/node/`
- [ ] Python specific → would go in `examples/python/`
- [ ] Other framework: ___
